message:
Command `# antenna_check.tcl runs check_antennas -verbose which internally calls PSM.
# This is the SAME issue as step 32! PSM-0069 on VCCD/VSSD might kill this too.
# But here it's in a "CheckAntennas" context - is it fatal here?
# 
# Let's check if there's any output in the log file yet:
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/openroad-checkantennas-1.log 2>/dev/null | wc -c
echo "---wc words---"
wc -c /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/openroad-checkantennas-1.log 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
